sql_fixture.redacted_sql: SELECT id FROM evidence_items WHERE tenant_id = :target_tenant_id AND project_id = :target_project_id AND id = :target_evidence_item_id

assertions.name: app_role_cannot_read_other_tenant_evidence_item
assertions.expected: EvidenceItem repository reads must be scoped by current tenant/project before returning evidence rows.

assertions.name: claim_binding_stays_project_scoped
assertions.expected: Evidence items remain tied to claims through the tenant_id, project_id, claim_id composite FK.

assertions.name: source_tenant_scope_does_not_weaken_project_scope
assertions.expected: Tenant-scoped evidence_sources do not allow evidence_items to escape claim/project boundaries.

metadata.notes: Sprint 10 BL-0029c full integration。Research/Evidence schema 系の cross-tenant negative skeleton fixture。No production row IDs or personal data.
